# israel-nadlan-data-collector

Public-safe collector for Israeli rent benchmark data.

## Core Tree

```text
src/rent_collector/
  cli.py
  config.py
  models.py
  pipeline.py
  provenance.py
  public_bundle.py
  source_registry.py
  collectors/
  utils/
configs/
  pipelines/public_release.yaml
  sources/*.yaml
docs/
tests/
```

## Key Pointers

- CLI entrypoints: `src/rent_collector/cli.py`
- Source registry: `src/rent_collector/source_registry.py`
- Bundle manifests and hashes: `src/rent_collector/provenance.py`
- Public bundle assembly: `src/rent_collector/public_bundle.py`
- Runtime config: `src/rent_collector/config.py`
- Source configs: `configs/sources/`
- Release pipeline config: `configs/pipelines/public_release.yaml`
- Public docs: `docs/`
- Tests: `tests/unit/`, `tests/integration/`
